name: matrix-oai-compatible-copilot-provider
description: OpenAI-compatible Copilot and VS Code language-model gateway with local proxy (Chat Completions + Responses API), usage telemetry, balance checking, and DeepSeek thinking-mode replay. / 支持本地代理(Chat Completions + Responses API)、用量统计、余额查询和 DeepSeek 思考模式回放的 OAI 网关。

matrixOaiCopilot.providers.description: Reusable upstream providers. Models reference these providers by providerId.

id.description: Stable provider id, for example openai, ollama, deepseek, lm-studio.

baseUrl.description: Provider base URL. For Ollama native mode use http://localhost:11434; OpenAI-compatible providers usually use a /v1 base URL.

apiMode.description: Provider API flavor. openai uses /chat/completions; ollama routes to native /api/chat; anthropic routes to native Anthropic Messages API (/v1/messages) with x-api-key authentication.

headers.description: Extra headers added to every request for this provider.

matrixOaiCopilot.models.description: Models exposed to Copilot Chat and the local proxy. Prefer providerId; legacy per-model baseUrl is still supported.

id.description: Model id sent to the upstream API, for example gpt-4o-mini or qwen2.5-coder:14b.

name.description: Display name shown in VS Code.

baseUrl.description: Legacy per-model base URL. Prefer providerId for new configs.

maxOutputTokens.description: Informational maximum output token limit advertised to VS Code.

showInModelPicker.description: Show this model in VS Code's language model picker. Set false to keep it configured for proxy/Codex/Claude Code/vision usage without exposing it in Copilot model lists.

hidden.description: Compatibility alias for hiding this model from VS Code's language model picker.

headers.description: Extra headers added only for this model.

omitUnsupportedParameters.description: Only send model, messages, stream, and tools/tool_choice. Useful for stricter OpenAI-compatible gateways.

requestTimeoutSeconds.description: Per-model upstream timeout. Useful for slow thinking/reasoning models.

stream.description: Per-model streaming override. When set, this overrides matrixOaiCopilot.stream.

context_length.description: Informational context length for OpenAI-compatible models.

max_tokens.description: Default output token limit sent to upstream requests when the client did not provide max_tokens.

maxTokens.description: Default output token limit sent to upstream requests when the client did not provide max_tokens.

temperature.description: Default temperature sent to upstream requests for this model.

top_p.description: Default top_p sent to upstream requests for this model.

top_k.description: Default top_k sent to upstream requests for this model.

min_p.description: Default min_p sent to upstream requests for this model.

presence_penalty.description: Default presence_penalty sent to upstream requests for this model.

frequency_penalty.description: Default frequency_penalty sent to upstream requests for this model.

repeat_penalty.description: Default repeat_penalty sent to upstream requests for this model.

seed.description: Default seed sent to upstream requests for this model.

enable_thinking.description: Default thinking toggle sent to upstream requests for models or gateways that support it.

thinking_budget.description: Default thinking token budget sent to upstream requests for models or gateways that support it.

thinking.description: Default thinking options sent to upstream requests for models or gateways that support them.

reasoning_effort.description: Default reasoning effort sent to upstream requests for models or gateways that support it.

stream_options.description: Streaming options sent to upstream requests, for example {"include_usage": true}.

thinkingFormat.description: Controls hidden reasoning_content replay for providers that require it. auto enables it for DeepSeek-compatible models.

reasoningContentFallback.description: When reasoning_content cannot be recovered from VS Code history, send an empty reasoning_content on assistant tool-call turns for compatible providers.

matrixOaiCopilot.defaultHeaders.description: Headers added to every upstream request.

matrixOaiCopilot.requestTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout for one upstream chat completion request.

matrixOaiCopilot.stream.description: Ask upstream endpoints for streaming responses.

matrixOaiCopilot.ollamaToolMode.description: Tool-call strategy for Ollama models. auto and native send Ollama's official tools field to /api/chat; prompt is a manual fallback for models with broken tool templates.

matrixOaiCopilot.copilot.thinkingEffort.description: Thinking effort override for DeepSeek models used through Copilot Chat. 'model' keeps the per-model configuration.

matrixOaiCopilot.copilot.enableVisionPro.description: For text-only models in Copilot Chat, describe image inputs with another available image-capable VS Code language model before sending the request upstream.

matrixOaiCopilot.copilot.visionProxyMode.description: Optional image-description proxy model. Use matrix:<model-id> for Matrix OAI configured image models or vscode:<model-id> for VS Code language models. Empty prefers Matrix OAI image-capable models, then VS Code image-capable models.

matrixOaiCopilot.copilot.visionProxyTime.description: Timeout for one image-description request made by the Copilot vision proxy.

matrixOaiCopilot.temperature.description: Optional default temperature. Null lets VS Code or the upstream model choose.

matrixOaiCopilot.logLevel.description: Write logs to the Matrix OAI Gateway output channel. API keys are never logged.

matrixOaiCopilot.proxy.defaultModel.description: Default VS Code language model id/name/family used when proxy requests do not match a configured OAI model.

matrixOaiCopilot.balanceRefreshMinutes.description: Minutes between automatic balance refreshes. Set in VS Code settings (matrixOaiCopilot.balanceRefreshMinutes).

matrixOaiCopilot.proxy.anthropicModelMap.description: Mapping from Claude model name (key) to upstream model ID (value) for Anthropic passthrough. Claude Code sends the Claude model name; the proxy maps it to the upstream provider's model ID. Example: {"claude-sonnet-4-20250514": "deepseek-v4-pro"}.

matrixOaiCopilot.proxy.codexModelMapping.description: Mapping from alias model name (key) to configured model ID (value) for Codex/OpenAI passthrough. Codex sends the alias; the proxy maps it to a configured model. Example: {"o3": "deepseek-v4-pro"}.
